title: How to Get a Police Certificate - Kenya - Canada.ca
content:
## How to Get a Police Certificate - Kenya
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
- Police Clearance Certificate

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.
Apply in person at the Directorate of Criminal Investigations Headquarters. You must bring your Police Clearance Certificate application (available in English only) with you.
You can find more information and instructions on how to apply on the Kenya Directorate of Criminal Investigations website (available in English only).
Directorate of Criminal Investigations
Criminal Records Office
Mazingira House, Kiambu Road
P.O. box 30460-00100
Telephone: 020-7202000 or 020-3343312
Email: identsnbi@gmail.com
